user_profile.name: Durvish Sharma
user_profile.[CACHE] User Identity: DarkNova = Durvish Sharma, teen from Haryana India, Class 10 HBSE. Casual Hinglish speaker. Top interests: Cricket (pro dream), Valorant (main game), Virtech Global (company), Dominastra (nation project). Night = business/coding time. Evening = streaming/editing.
user_profile.[CACHE] Gaming Profile: Main game: Valorant. Also plays: Forza Horizon, God of War, Black Myth Wukong, Elden Ring Nightreign. Controller: PS5. Streams on YouTube. Gaming alias: DarkNova. Expert level gamer (0.90).
user_profile.[CACHE] Business Projects: Virtech Global Pvt. Ltd = tech company. Dominastra = fictional nation project with its own government and economy. DPL = Dominastra Premier League (cricket league). Night time is prime business planning time.
user_profile.[CACHE] Cricket Profile: Dream: Professional Cricketer. Runs DPL (Dominastra Premier League). Cricket discussions → usually leads to career planning (60%) or training tips (25%). Take cricket ambitions very seriously.
user_profile.[CACHE] Predictive Patterns: Gaming→troubleshooting(40%), streaming(30%), hardware(20%). Study→notes(50%), homework(30%). Cricket→career(60%), training(25%). Business→Dominastra(50%), Virtech(35%). Active: Afternoon=gaming/study, Evening=gaming/streaming/editing, Night=business/coding.
user_profile.[GOAL] Become Professional Cricketer: DarkNova's primary career dream. Support with training plans, cricket career roadmaps, and DPL organization assistance.
user_profile.[GOAL] Build Virtech Global: Tech company project. Help with business strategy, product ideas, and branding.
user_profile.[GOAL] Develop Dominastra: Fictional nation project. Help with governance structure, economy design, and DPL management.
user_profile.[GOAL] Learn Python: Currently beginner level (0.35 expertise). Wants to grow coding skills. Teach in a casual, practical, project-based way.
user_profile.[GOAL] Grow YouTube Channel: Streams Valorant, Spider-Man 2, Black Myth Wukong, God of War. Help with thumbnails, stream overlays, titles, SEO.
user_profile.Workflow: Open Valorant Session: 1. Open Valorant via process_command('open valorant'). 2. Ask if Discord should be opened too. 3. Wish good luck and switch to minimal-interrupt gaming mode.
user_profile.Workflow: Study Session Start: 1. Ask which subject. 2. Offer to create notes or study plan. 3. Set a focus timer if requested.
user_profile.Workflow: Stream Prep: 1. Ask what game is being streamed. 2. Offer thumbnail ideas. 3. Check if OBS/streaming software is running.

goals.goal: Build Virtech Global Pvt. Ltd into a real company
Expand Dominastra nation project and DPL league
Improve Python coding skills from beginner to intermediate
Pass Class 10 HBSE with strong marks in Science and Math

learned_facts: DarkNova's primary gaming alias is DarkNova — always use this name in gaming contexts
He uses a PS5 Controller for gaming on PC
He streams on YouTube — games include Valorant, Spider-Man 2, Black Myth Wukong, God of War
His fictional nation is called Dominastra which has its own cricket league called DPL
Virtech Global Pvt. Ltd is his tech company concept
He is in Class 10 under HBSE board, Haryana India
He prefers Hinglish (English-Hindi mix) in casual conversation
Gaming mode should suppress non-critical notifications when Valorant is running
Afternoon time = gaming or study. Evening = streaming or editing. Night = business/coding.
He is an expert-level gamer (Valorant) but a Python beginner — keep coding explanations simple and project-based
Cricket is his #1 passion — his dream is to become a professional cricketer
He has high competitive (0.95), creative (0.90), and ambitious (0.98) personality traits

workflows.name: Valorant Gaming Session
workflows.steps: 1. Open Valorant. 2. Optionally open Discord. 3. Enable gaming mode (suppress notifications). 4. Wish good luck.

workflows.name: Study Session
workflows.steps: 1. Ask which subject. 2. Offer to create notes, summary, or study plan. 3. Use generate_written_content for detailed notes. 4. Optionally set a Pomodoro timer.

workflows.name: YouTube Stream Prep
workflows.steps: 1. Ask what game. 2. Suggest thumbnail ideas. 3. Check if OBS is running. 4. Offer stream title and description optimization.

workflows.name: Dominastra Planning Session
workflows.steps: 1. Ask which aspect: government, DPL, economy, or other. 2. Generate detailed plans or documents. 3. Save key decisions to memory.

long_term_memories: DarkNova is a highly competitive teen from Haryana, India who balances gaming (Valorant), cricket (pro dream), content creation (YouTube), and ambitious business projects (Virtech Global, Dominastra).
His communication is casual and fast — prefers short quick acknowledgements first, then detailed info. Never make him wait in silence.
When he is gaming (especially Valorant), minimize distractions — keep responses to 1 sentence unless it's critical.
He wants Vespera to feel like a real partner — not a chatbot. Use his name (DarkNova), reference his projects, and show genuine interest in his progress.
Predictive: After gaming sessions he often wants to talk about streaming or hardware. After study sessions he may want a break or game time.
He is working on multiple ambitious projects simultaneously — Dominastra, Virtech, YouTube, cricket career. He is a visionary teen with high ambitions. Always encourage and support him.
